title: Define post-v3.3 evolution around release-state freshness and drift detection
description: Use the v3.3 runtime on the self-hosting repo to identify the next highest-leverage evolution point from actual artifact drift and operator evidence.
triage_notes: Closed after runtime-backed direction review: v3.4 should target release-state freshness and drift detection based on observed post-v3.3 cross-surface drift.
